questions.question: What does the pandas library provide for handling missing data?
questions.explanation: pandas library provides the isnull() and fillna() functions for handling missing data.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the pd.concat() function in pandas?
questions.explanation: The pd.concat() function is used to concatenate data from different sources or dataframes.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the pd.get_dummies() function in pandas?
options: C) To convert categorical data into numerical data
questions.explanation: The pd.get_dummies() function is used to convert categorical data into numerical data.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the pd.cut() function in pandas?
questions.explanation: The pd.cut() function is used to bin data into discrete ranges.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the pd.factorize() function in pandas?
options: B) To convert categorical data into numerical data
questions.explanation: The pd.factorize() function is used to convert categorical data into numerical data by creating unique codes for each category.
